purpose: Hard 80 offline Alpha Tree parser/validator benchmark selected for current failures and regression risk.
selection_method: Pass 1 scored all 2000 cases against current normalizeToAlphaJsonV14 and validateAlphaJson behavior.
Pass 2 selected high-value failures across parser, readiness, follow-up, warning, and original dataset categories.
Pass 3 filled remaining slots by highest current failure score to maximize today's measurable error rate without using random selection.
